strengths: Clean utility extraction — formatTitle and getFaviconLink are minimal, testable pure functions
Genuine TDD red phase: title.test.ts imports from real ./title module, ensuring the module-not-found failure
Both desktop Sidebar and MobileNav consistently use settings from useBoard() — no duplication of fetch logic
Settings nav item integrated naturally into existing NAV_ITEMS pattern
Dynamic title correctly differentiates /settings route ("Settings — <board>") from other routes ("<board> — Kanban")
Favicon logic handles missing link element gracefully by creating it on demand
